hooks.command: : pwg-guard-v3; i=$(cat); c=$(printf '%s' "$i" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$c" ] && c=$i; printf '%s' "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|])[[:space:]]*(git([[:space:]]+(-[Cc][[:space:]]+[^[:space:];&|]+|--[A-Za-z][A-Za-z-]*(=[^[:space:];&|]*)?|-[A-Za-z]+))*[[:space:]]+push|gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+(create|merge))([[:space:];&|]|$)' || exit 0; d=''; t=$(printf '%s' "$c" | sed -n 's/.*git[[:space:]][[:space:]]*-C[[:space:]][[:space:]]*\([^[:space:];&][^[:space:];&]*\).*/\1/p'); [ -n "$t" ] && d=$t; if [ -z "$d" ]; then p=$(printf '%s' "$c" | sed -n 's/^[[:space:]]*cd[[:space:]][[:space:]]*\([^[:space:];&][^[:space:];&]*\).*/\1/p'); [ -n "$p" ] && d=$p; fi; case $d in '~') d=$HOME;; '~/'*) d=$HOME/${d#\~/};; esac; if [ -n "$d" ]; then b=$(git -C "$d" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); else b=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); fi; printf '%s' "$b" | grep -Eqi '^(AGENT-PREAMBLE|bob|dia|dr-sommer|engels|gary|hans-cee|jack|james|lenin|linus|lorne-cee|maschin|obi|rumi|sensei|seo-[a-z-]+|steffi|sven|trillian)/' && exit 0; echo "Write blocked (PWG/#813): branch '$b' is not a sanctioned <persona>/… branch. A no-persona/cloud session must PROPOSE, not push or open PRs." >&2; exit 2
